coalitions: Nordic front (Norway-Finland-Denmark) resisting expanded Chinese Arctic Council role
Russia-China partnership strained by China's unilateral icebreaker/base announcement
note: China's surprise icebreaker-fleet announcement spooked Finland and Denmark and pushed Russia to tighten rather than loosen NSR access even for Beijing, so under neutral mood and medium mediator pressure the parties settled for a confidence-building framework (notification protocols, observer-status language) while deferring the hard sovereignty and shelf disputes, with Norway's momentum letting it fully protect its Svalbard EEZ position.
